parameters.command: ssh root@10.90.10.10 "pct exec {{$json.containers[$splitInBatches.index].id}} -- bash -c 'apt update -qq && apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | grep -c upgradable || echo 0'"
ssh root@10.90.10.10 "pct exec {{$json.containers[$splitInBatches.index].id}} -- bash -c 'DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt upgrade -y 2>&1'"
